title: cynanchum sublanceolatum var. dickinsii
intro: Cynanchum sublanceolatum var. dickinsii, also known as Korean milkvetch or Yangshan jade lady, is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum sublanceolatum var. dickinsii include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
